overview: Lamu Sports Hub (LSH) is a mobile-first Progressive Web App for football in Lamu County, Kenya. It covers the FKF Lamu County League and Lamu Premier League with live scores, standings, team/player directories, news, fan engagement, and an admin panel. Built on the Internet Computer blockchain for secure, transparent data storage.
features: Live match scores with auto-refresh every 30 seconds
League standings with gold/silver/bronze position badges
Team and player directories with stats
Share buttons on matches and news with picture and link
Favourite teams and follow players with backend sync
Functional notifications tab showing live fan activity
Settings page with theme, alerts, and personal details
About page with LSH history, officials, and contacts
Latest news section on home screen
Registered players directory with admin approval
Internet Identity login for secure access
Admin panel for managing all league data on-chain
